creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Are you sure all these ports compile and run afterwards with X264
enabled? :-)

multimedia/arista
multimedia/avidemux2
multimedia/ffmpeg
multimedia/ffmpeg-devel
multimedia/gstreamer-plugins-x264
multimedia/handbrake
multimedia/libquicktime
multimedia/lives
multimedia/mencoder
multimedia/mpeg4ip
multimedia/mplayer
multimedia/ogmrip
multimedia/transcode
multimedia/vlc
multimedia/xfce4-parole
net/opal3

To make this update reality, ALL PORTS ABOVE have to work with it.

I will update ffmpeg soon to 0.5.1 that supports recent x264 versions, I
am going to update ffmpeg-devel as well.
Vlc should be no problem (as x264 is their own project).
libquicktime is my port as well.
The other ports are a question, though. The worst case is to have two
x264's in the ports tree.
